title: Waterproof Neoprene Cosmetic Bag Wet Dry Bikini Storage Pouch Portable Beach Makeup Bag With Custom Logo
seoTitle: Custom Neoprene Makeup Bag with Zipper | OEM Cosmetic Bag
description:
Designed for beach vacations, swimming, fitness, and travel, this custom brown waterproof neoprene wet bikini bag is a practical solution for carrying wet swimwear, cosmetics, toiletries, and personal essentials. Manufactured from premium neoprene material, it combines flexibility, durability, and water resistance in a lightweight design.

The waterproof interior helps isolate moisture from other belongings, making it ideal for storing wet bikinis, swimsuits, towels, or gym clothing after use. The secure zipper closure prevents leaks, while the attached metal carabiner allows the pouch to be clipped onto backpacks, beach totes, luggage, or travel bags for convenient carrying.

Its minimalist design, large branding area, and premium finish make it an excellent choice for private label collections, promotional gifts, travel brands, sports brands, and retailers.

As a professional OEM & ODM manufacturer, O'lay Technology Co., Ltd offers full customization services, including logo printing, custom colors, dimensions, zipper options, lining materials, packaging, and branding solutions.
seoDescription: Custom waterproof neoprene cosmetic bags from O'lay Technology Co., Ltd. OEM & ODM manufacturer offering custom logos, sizes, colors, and private label solutions for global brands.
